consulted.concept: Perceptual color-merge tolerance (delta_e <= 5.0)
Stacked vs cutout color layering topology
HSL-distance nearest-color matching for palette mapping
Bounded color palette (max 15 thread colors)
alphamax corner threshold (curve vs corner decision)
opticurve: true Bezier optimization vs raw polygon
opttolerance curve-optimization tolerance (node count vs fit)
Curve segment joining and splice length (secondary opttolerance analogue)
Corner detection threshold for edge/corner fidelity
max path deviation <= 0.5mm (geometric edge fidelity target)
Node/element count as a path-topology quality target
turnpolicy: resolving ambiguous turns in path decomposition
blacklevel / bilevel cutoff: threshold choice preserves silhouette
mkbitmap highpass filter: evening out background gradients
mkbitmap lowpass filter: smoothing foreground detail before tracing
turdsize: suppress paths below an area (speckle removal)
